languages.text: {n}Голос Вигдис прерывается помехами, однако все же различим:{/n} "Лорд-капитан, вы целы! Боевой отряд экстракции уже был направлен на поиски — я передам их шаттлам ваши координаты".

{n}Vigdis's voice is interrupted by static, but you can still make it out.{/n} "Lord Captain, you're alive! An extraction team was already on its way to search for you. Transmitting your coordinates to their shuttles."
languages.original_text: {n}Голос Вигдис прерывается помехами, однако все же различим:{/n} "Лорд-капитан, вы целы! Боевой отряд экстракции уже был направлен на поиски — я передам их шаттлам ваши координаты".

traits.locale_text: {n}Vigdis's voice is interrupted by static, but you can still make it out:{/n} "Lord Captain, you're alive! An extraction team was already on its way to search for you. Transmitting your coordinates to their shuttles."

{n}Vigdis's voice is interrupted by static, but you can still make it out.{/n} "Lord Captain, you're alive! An extraction team was already on its way to search for you. Transmitting your coordinates to their shuttles."

{n}Vigdis's voice is interrupted by static, but you can still make it out:{/n} "Lord Captain! At last. We were already preparing an assault unit for extraction. Of course, relaying your orders to the hangar immediately."

{n}Vigdis's voice is interrupted by static, but you can still make it out:{/n} "Lord Captain, you're alive! An extraction team was already on its way to search for you. Transmitting your coordinates to their shuttles."

{n}Vigdis's voice is interrupted by static, but you can still make it out.{/n} "Lord Captain, you're alive! An extraction team was already on its way to search for you. Transmitting your coordinates to their shuttles."

languages.text: {n}ヴィグディスの声は雑音で途切れがちだが、かろうじて聞き取れる:{/n} 「船長閣下！やっとです。救出のための強襲部隊の準備はすでに進めていました。もちろん、ご命令は直ちに格納庫へ伝えます」
languages.original_text: {n}Vigdis's voice is interrupted by static, but you can still make it out:{/n} "Lord Captain! At last. We were already preparing an assault unit for extraction. Of course, relaying your orders to the hangar immediately."

traits.locale_text: {n}ヴィグディスの声は雑音で途切れがちだが、かろうじて聞き取れる:{/n} 「船長閣下！やっとです。救出のための強襲部隊の準備はすでに進めていました。もちろん、ご命令は直ちに格納庫へ伝えます。」

languages.text: {n}La voix de Vigdis est entrecoupée de parasites, mais vous parvenez tout de même à comprendre son message.{/n} « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, vous êtes en vie ! Nous avons déjà envoyé une équipe d'extraction à votre recherche. Je vous transmets les coordonnées de sa navette. »
languages.original_text: {n}Vigdis's voice is interrupted by static, but you can still make it out.{/n} "Lord Captain, you're alive! An extraction team was already on its way to search for you. Transmitting your coordinates to their shuttles."

traits.locale_text: {n}La voix de Vigdis est entrecoupée de parasites, mais vous parvenez tout de même à comprendre son message.{/n} « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, vous êtes en vie ! Nous avons déjà envoyé une équipe d'extraction à votre recherche. Je vous transmets les coordonnées de sa navette. »

languages.text: {n}Vigdis'in sesi cızırtıyla kesilse de dediklerini anlayabiliyorsun.{/n} "Lord Kaptan, hayattasınız! Bir kurtarma ekibi sizi aramak üzere yola çıkmıştı. Koordinatlarınızı iletiyorum."
languages.original_text: {n}Vigdis's voice is interrupted by static, but you can still make it out.{/n} "Lord Captain, you're alive! An extraction team was already on its way to search for you. Transmitting your coordinates to their shuttles."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vigdis'in sesi cızırtıyla kesilse de dediklerini anlayabiliyorsun.{/n} "Lord Kaptan, hayattasınız! Bir kurtarma ekibi sizi aramak üzere yola çıkmıştı. Koordinatlarınızı iletiyorum."

languages.text: {n}Die Stimme von Vigdis ist verzerrt, aber du kannst sie trotzdem hören.{/n} "Lord Captain, Ihr lebt! Ein Bergungsteam ist schon unterwegs, um Euch zu suchen. Übertrage Eure Koordinaten an ihre Shuttles."
languages.original_text: {n}Vigdis's voice is interrupted by static, but you can still make it out.{/n} "Lord Captain, you're alive! An extraction team was already on its way to search for you. Transmitting your coordinates to their shuttles."

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Stimme von Vigdis ist verzerrt, aber du kannst sie trotzdem hören.{/n} "Lord Captain, Ihr lebt! Ein Bergungsteam ist schon unterwegs, um Euch zu suchen. Übertrage Eure Koordinaten an ihre Shuttles."

languages.text: {n}A pesar de la estática, logras entender la voz de Vigdis.{/n} «Lord Capitán, ¡aún vive! Ya habíamos enviado un equipo de extracción en su busca. Transmitiré su posición a las lanzaderas».
languages.original_text: {n}Vigdis's voice is interrupted by static, but you can still make it out.{/n} "Lord Captain, you're alive! An extraction team was already on its way to search for you. Transmitting your coordinates to their shuttles."

traits.locale_text: {n}A pesar de la estática, logras entender la voz de Vigdis.{/n} «Lord Capitán, ¡aún vive! Ya habíamos enviado un equipo de extracción en su busca. Transmitiré su posición a las lanzaderas».

languages.text: {n}维格迪斯的声音被杂音干扰，但仍依稀可辨。{/n}“舰长大人，您还活着！我们已经派出搜救队去找您。我这就把您的坐标发给他们的穿梭机。”
languages.original_text: {n}Vigdis's voice is interrupted by static, but you can still make it out.{/n} "Lord Captain, you're alive! An extraction team was already on its way to search for you. Transmitting your coordinates to their shuttles."

traits.locale_text: {n}维格迪斯的声音被杂音干扰，但仍依稀可辨。{/n}“舰长大人，您还活着！我们已经派出搜救队去找您。我这就把您的坐标发给他们的穿梭机。”
